hero.subheadline: Fullstack Developer with nearly 4 years of experience in React and TypeScript, focused on AI, automation, and now diving into Go.

frontend.title: Frontend Expert
frontend.description: Specialized in React and TypeScript. Complex bug resolution and performance optimization through parallel async requests.

automation.title: Automation & AI
automation.description: Building automation scripts and integrating AI solutions into professional workflows.

learning.title: Constantly Evolving
learning.description: Currently deep-diving into Go (Golang), drawn to its efficiency and design for high-performance systems.

personal.title: Beyond the Code
personal.description: Away from screens, my life runs on two wheels. At the end of 2024 I got a Classic 350 that became my adventure companion.
